sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect } from "react" const CYAN = "#00f5ff" const MAGENTA = "#ff00aa" const BG = "#020408" const STRIPE_USD = "https://buy.stripe.com/9B65kDd6j9NX1lZ6bq2ZO01" const STRIPE_BRL = "https://buy.stripe.com/3cIfZh9U7gclaWzeHW2ZO02" export default function App() { const [glitch, setGlitch] = useState(false) useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setGlitch(true) setTimeout(() => setGlitch(false), 150) }, 4000) return () => clearInterval(interval) }, []) const archives = [ { id: "EM-001", title: "Eddie Marsh — Railway Deployment Log", date: "2036-03-14", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, { id: "VX-047", title: "Voss Internal Memo — ALADDIN-9 Merger Protocol", date: "2128-11-02", tag: "TOP SECRET", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "CL-000", title: "C.L.A.W. Boot Sequence — First Contact", date: "2010-07-01", tag: "ARCHIVED", color: CYAN }, { id: "IS-312", title: "Inner Sectors Dispatch — Level 4 Activity Report", date: "2162-05-14", tag: "LIVE FEED", color: "#22c55e" }, { id: "GL-099", title: "Geneva Lake Monitor — 31 Years of Silence", date: "2162-01-01", tag: "RESTRICTED", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "PR-001", title: "Prometheus Documentation — Integration Levels 1-4", date: "2039-08-22", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, ] return (
SIGNAL.tv
ARCHIVE TERMINAL ACCESS
TRANSMISSION ACTIVE — CHICAGO 2162

THE ARCHIVE
IS OPEN

Classified documents. C.L.A.W. logs. Inner Sectors transmissions.

The universe of CLAW AI continues here — Eddie Marsh's files, Voss dossiers, Chicago 2162 dispatches.

ACCESS — $4.99/mo ACESSO — R$12,90/mês
Cancel anytime · Immediate archive access · 247+ documents
— RECENT TRANSMISSIONS —
{archives.map(a => (
{a.id} {a.title}
{a.tag} {a.date} 🔒
))}
+ 247 classified documents available to subscribers
SIGNAL.tv · CLAW AI UNIVERSE TRANSMISSION · © 2162
) }
